text:
Created attachment 205598
py-cfn-lint's patch file.

Update to 0.22.1

ChangeLogs:
- Update specs from weird 4.1.0 release
- Update instance types and patches from SSM to date 2019.07.04
- Remove/Add services to region tables based on SSM endpoints
- Update JsonSchem to 3.0 to support he new version 1.12.0 of devel/py-aws-sam-translator
- and others.
